lang.name: English
start.welcome:
Hi {name}! 👋

Welcome to the downloader bot. Just send a link to a video or post from a supported social network and we will send the file back to you.

This bot only downloads public, permitted content.
help.text:
📖 How to use this bot

1. Send a public link to a video or post from a supported social network (Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, Twitter/X).
2. Private or restricted content is not supported.
3. Please respect content rights and each platform's terms.

Commands:
/start - restart the bot
/lang - change language
/plans - view subscription plans
/help - show this guide

📮 Contact support: coming soon

Note: this bot only downloads public, permitted content and cannot access private content.
download.denied.blocked: Unfortunately your access to this bot has been blocked. Please contact support if you think this is a mistake.
download.denied.maintenance: 🛠 The bot is currently under maintenance. Please try again a bit later.
download.denied.limit_reached: You have used up your free downloads for today. You can buy a subscription for more downloads, or try again tomorrow.
download.denied.need_subscription: You need an active subscription to download this content. You can pick one of the plans below:
download.denied.group_disabled: This bot is disabled in this group.
download.denied.rate_limited: You are sending requests too quickly. Please wait a moment and try again.
download.denied.generic: Your request cannot be processed right now. Please try again later.
download.unsupported_url: This link is not supported. Please send a link from a supported social network. Use /help for guidance.
download.invalid_url: Please send the link of the video or post you want to download. Use /help for guidance.
forced_join.prompt: To use this bot, please join the channels below first. After joining, tap the "I joined" button:
forced_join.verified: Your membership is confirmed. ✅ Now send your link again.
forced_join.still_missing: You have not joined all the required channels yet. Please join them first and try again.
plans.title: 💳 Available plans
plans.empty: There are no plans available for purchase right now.
plans.group_empty: There are no group plans available for purchase right now.
payment.link_ready: Your payment link is ready. Tap the button below to complete the purchase:
payment.failed: Something went wrong while creating your payment link. Please try again later.
errors.api_unreachable: We cannot reach the server right now. Please try again in a few moments.
menu.title: Main menu 👇
download.prompt:
Please send the public link you want from Instagram, YouTube, TikTok or X/Twitter.

Only public, permitted content is supported.
